understanding.goal_understanding: The objective was to solve each level by positioning every selectable piece onto the goal tile(s) marked '+' in the semantic grid at the same time; when all goals are occupied simultaneously the level reports WIN, and completing all levels wins the full run within the per-level step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each action moved the currently selected piece one grid cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction unless blocked by walls or other blocking objects; if a pushable object (block) was adjacent in the movement direction, it could be pushed along with the selected piece if space allowed. Walls ('#') and boundaries could prevent movement, and the movement_blocked hints only indicated adjacency and were not definitive. When multiple selectables existed, control could be switched by CLICKing the exact pixel/grid position of another selectable; however, clicking a position without a selectable (or an unreachable/invalid target) had no effect. The run ended when the step budget reached zero before achieving the WIN condition.
